prompt: Storyboard frame — CTA end card, aspect 9:16: Centered Block Blast logo lockup on a deep navy background (#1E2744) with a soft royal blue (#5469B9) gradient halo, a single glossy beveled gold block (#FFD700) resting beside the logo, a pulsing gold rounded-rectangle button below.
